# Dyna Store

> Cambodian gaming store — buy PC and console games with Bakong KHQR top-up.

Dyna Store lets users top up a wallet using KHQR (Bakong, ABA, and other Cambodian banks) or by uploading a manual payment receipt, then purchase games from the catalog. Owned games can be downloaded directly from the user's library.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Game catalog, top-up wallet, featured titles.
- [Sign in](/login): Email and Google sign-in.

## Optional

- [Library](/library): Authenticated user's purchased games and downloads.
- [Account](/account): Authenticated user profile and settings.
